trivia: The CJ2 stretched Cessna's single-pilot light jet formula, and the Plus added better engines and avionics. The Dex collects them as one series because their shared designator cannot split them.
Light jets are single-pilot certified, so the airplane overhead may have exactly one person aboard, flying their own jet.
funFacts: Part of the best-selling business jet family in history.
